timeline.description: Initial tribe formation with three tribes based on dominant attributes
timeline.impact: 18 castaways divided into three tribes of six

timeline.description: First Impressions twist - tribe leaders selected, weakest members sent to camp early

details.mechanic: Each tribe selected a leader who then designated the 'weakest' member
details.choice_given: Players sent early could choose between rice for the tribe or a clue to the Hidden Immunity Idol

timeline.impact: Created early advantages and strategic dilemmas

timeline.description: Hidden Immunity Idol found by castaway who chose clue over rice

details.method: Chose idol clue instead of rice for tribe

timeline.impact: Early idol in play, tribe potentially without extra rice

timeline.description: Luzon tribe disbanded, remaining 14 castaways redistributed into two tribes

tribes_after_swap.name: Aparri
tribes_after_swap.composition: Mix of original Brawn, Brains, and Beauty

tribes_after_swap.name: Solana
tribes_after_swap.composition: Mix of original Brawn and Beauty

timeline.impact: Luzon tribe dissolved, 14 players redistributed into new Aparri and Solana

timeline.description: Lindsey Ogle quit the game after Cliff's elimination
timeline.reason: Rivalry with Trish Hegarty reached breaking point; quit to avoid potential physical confrontation
timeline.impact: Only contestant in Cagayan to never receive a vote against them; reduced player count to 12
timeline.notable: First and only quit in Season 28

timeline.impact: Individual game begins with 11 players; Sarah as potential swing vote between original tribal lines

timeline.description: Special Hidden Immunity Idol with unique powers announced at merge

details.power: Can be played AFTER votes are read at Tribal Council
details.previous_appearances: Similar to idols in Survivor: Panama and Cook Islands

timeline.impact: Introduction of most powerful idol type; significant strategic element
timeline.controversy: Widely criticized by fans as too powerful

timeline.description: Spencer found Hidden Immunity Idol after discovering clue at reward
timeline.impact: Spencer gained protection heading into merge votes

details.resolution: Drew rocks to determine winner - Tony drew black rock and won

timeline.impact: Tony received clue leading to Special Idol discovery

timeline.description: Tony found the Special Hidden Immunity Idol (Tyler Perry Idol)
timeline.idol_type: Special Idol - playable after votes are read
timeline.power: Can be used after votes are read at Tribal Council
timeline.found_after: Winning auction advantage for idol clue
timeline.impact: Tony possessed most powerful idol in game; used strategically as threat even when expired

timeline.description: Tony publicly announced he had a Hidden Immunity Idol, then gave it to LJ

details.action: Tony announced idol publicly at Tribal Council and gave it to LJ McKanas
Tony displayed both regular idol and Super Idol, claimed Super Idol would save him at Final 4
details.truth: Super Idol was only valid until Final 5
details.result: Successfully bluffed through Final 4 Tribal Council, then revealed idol had expired

timeline.impact: Prevented votes against Tony; influenced jury perception positively; demonstrated strategic mastery

timeline.description: Final Tribal Council and jury vote
timeline.impact: Tony Vlachos crowned Sole Survivor and winner of $1,000,000

season_mechanics.description: Brawn vs. Brains vs. Beauty theme
Tribe leaders selected weakest members who were sent to camp early with choice of rice or idol clue
Special Hidden Immunity Idol playable after votes are read, valid until Final 5
Day 12 swap dissolved weakest tribe (Luzon) and redistributed into two tribes
Included advantage for idol clue, determined by rock draw between bidders
